title: April 21st, 2022
body:
lyrics

i lack the disposition
to stay stacked in this position
like a dish positioned
to pick up every bleep your blippin
and now for something completely different
i'm a libra tippin extra cuz i'm eatin
and this isn't even livin wages
only givin raises to eager beavers
get in and don't be precious
i'm a lazy river
in which a preacher might dip believers
to each er own
flowin even when i'm spittin features
go on and go in then
the water's warm and we ain't gettin younger
in the dark it's cool and you can always find that
underneath the surface if you want to
unless you know the depths are filled with monsters
the pressure builds the stress enough to pop ya
and the bends'll break ya if you don't ascend properly
who bout to tell the water notta seas property
who bout to tell all the otters they oughta swim more thoughtfully
who bout to tell my daughter the tides don't mean anything
when you got a boat and profits
see the coast and dock it
so you can control the options
sittin on the bank watching clockin
like the river's your enemy
soaking everyone who got in in toxins
you stew but can't stomach
you'll be dammed if you don't stop it
from eroding your fortunes
trembling in your fortress
only trust anenome when they fit in a portrait
and it's unfortunate cuz nothing worth it
fit to be framed by purchase
survival is a serpent
snakes in the grass we too nervous
but a winding path in the wild reminds us of our purpose
i dive in, break the surface, smile
grateful the current's still in service
while i'm tryin to swim in circles
searchin for the ocean i'm from
before i went searchin
for the way the rain went after the storms surged in
i remember seein y'all pour in, the waves surgin
opened me up like a surgeon
til the river sewed me enough to return to surfin

thoughts

with not enough energy or too much friction i get stuck

with too much energy or not enough friction i can't steer
